name: DST_123_ÜRETİM_İHTİYAÇ_RAPORU_TOPLAM
definition:
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[DST_123_ÜRETİM_İHTİYAÇ_RAPORU_TOPLAM] AS 



SELECT MLZ_ID,FIS_NO,FİŞ_TARİHİ,FİŞ_ÖZEL_KODU,PROJE_KODU,URETIM_BITIS_TARIHI,ANAMALZEME_URETIM_TARIHI,MALZEME_ÖZEL_KODU_ANAMALZEME,ANA_ÜRÜN_MİKTAR,KARAVAN_KODU_TÜR,KARAVAN_KODU,KARAVAN_ADI,ALT_KOD_TÜR,MALZEME_ÖZEL_KODU_ALT,ALIM_TARIH,ALIM_TARIH_AY,ALIM_TARIH_HAFTA,ALT_KOD,ALT_ADI,MIKTAR,RAPOR.BIRIM,
PROJELERE_ÇIKIŞLAR,PROJELERE_ÇIKIŞLAR_YENI,ELDE_KALAN,[ÜRETİM DEPO],AÇIK_SATINALMA_SİPARİŞLERİ,

--(ANA_ÜRÜN_MİKTAR*MIKTAR) AS TOPLAM_İHTİYAÇ,
0 AS TOPLAM_İHTİYAÇ,
BIRIM_FIYATLAR BIRIM_FIYAT_OLD, (MIKTAR*BIRIM_FIYATLAR) AS TUTAR_OLD ,[SON SATINALMA CARİ ÜNVANI] , ANASTOKGRUPKODU,ALTSTOKGRUPKODU,HIZLI_URETIM, (MIKTAR*BIRIM_FIYAT) AS TUTAR , BIRIM_FIYAT

FROM (
SELECT ANAMLZ.LOGICALREF AS MLZ_ID,
DEMFICHE.FICHENO FIS_NO,
PRO.CODE PROJE_KODU,
convert(varchar, DEMFICHE.DATE_, 104)FİŞ_TARİHİ,
--DEMFICHE.DATE_ FİŞ_TARİHİ,
convert(varchar, XT12.URETIM_BITIS_TARIHI, 104)URETIM_BITIS_TARIHI,
----------------------------
convert(varchar, DATEADD(day,ANAMLZ.SPECODE4*-1,XT12.URETIM_BITIS_TARIHI), 104)AS ANAMALZEME_URETIM_TARIHI,
convert(varchar, DATEADD(day,ALT_MLZ.SPECODE4*-1,XT12.URETIM_BITIS_TARIHI), 104)AS ALIM_TARIH_ESKI,
convert(varchar, DATEADD(day,(convert(int,ALT_MLZ.SPECODE4)+convert(int,ANAMLZ.SPECODE4))*-1,XT12.URETIM_BITIS_TARIHI), 104)AS ALIM_TARIH,
--convert(int,ALT_MLZ.SPECODE4)+convert(int,ANAMLZ.SPECODE4) AS XX,


DATEPART(WK,(convert(datetime, DATEADD(day,(convert(int,ALT_MLZ.SPECODE4)+convert(int,ANAMLZ.SPECODE4))*-1,XT12.URETIM_BITIS_TARIHI), 104)))AS ALIM_TARIH_HAFTA,


----------------------------------
ANAMLZ.STGRPCODE ANASTOKGRUPKODU,
ALT_MLZ.STGRPCODE ALTSTOKGRUPKODU,
--XT12.URETIM_BITIS_TARIHI  URETIM_BITIS_TARIHI,
ALT_MLZ.SPECODE4 MALZEME_ÖZEL_KODU_ALT,
DEMFICHE.SPECODE FİŞ_ÖZEL_KODU,
--convert(varchar, DATEADD(day,ALT_MLZ.SPECODE4*-1,XT12.URETIM_BITIS_TARIHI), 104)AS ALIM_TARIH,

-- DATEADD(day,ALT_MLZ.SPECODE4*-1,XT12.URETIM_BITIS_TARIHI) AS ALIM_TARIH,
 MONTH(DATEADD(day,(convert(int,ALT_MLZ.SPECODE4)+convert(int,ANAMLZ.SPECODE4))*-1,XT12.URETIM_BITIS_TARIHI)) ALIM_TARIH_AY,

DEM.AMOUNT AS [ANA_ÜRÜN_MİKTAR],
ANAMLZ.SPECODE4 MALZEME_ÖZEL_KODU_ANAMALZEME,
CASE ANAMLZ.CARDTYPE WHEN 10 THEN 'Hammadde' WHEN 11 THEN 'Yarımamül'WHEN 12 THEN 'Mamül'WHEN 1 THEN 'Ticarimal'ELSE 'DIGER'END AS KARAVAN_KODU_TÜR,
ANAMLZ.CODE AS KARAVAN_KODU,
ANAMLZ.NAME AS KARAVAN_ADI,
ALT_MLZ.CODE AS ALT_KOD,
CASE ALT_MLZ.CARDTYPE WHEN 10 THEN 'Hammadde' WHEN 11 THEN 'Yarımamül'WHEN 12 THEN 'Mamül'WHEN 1 THEN 'Ticarimal'ELSE 'DIGER'END AS ALT_KOD_TÜR,
ALT_MLZ.NAME AS ALT_ADI
,BAGTBL.AMNT AS MIKTAR
,UNT.CODE [BIRIM]
---,(SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WHERE LINETYPE=0 AND PRICE<>0 AND STOCKREF=BAGTBL.STCREF AND TRCODE IN (1,50) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC ) BIRIM_FIYATLAR ---27012023 tarıhlı degısım

------------------27.01.2023
--,CAST(CAST(
--	ISNULL
--	(CASE WHEN 
	
--	(sELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=BAGTBL.STCREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1,50) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK)  WHERE CARDREF=BAGTBL.STCREF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC    )	
	
--	ELSE (sELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK)  WHERE STOCKREF=BAGTBL.STCREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1,50) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) END ,0) AS  DECIMAL(18,2)) AS float) AS BIRIM_FIYATLAR
	---------------------27.01.2023 revıze
		,CASE ALT_MLZ.CARDTYPE WHEN 10 THEN
	CAST(CAST(
	ISNULL
	(CASE WHEN 
	
	(sELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=BAGTBL.STCREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1,50) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK)  WHERE CARDREF=BAGTBL.STCREF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC    )	
	
	ELSE (sELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK)  WHERE STOCKREF=BAGTBL.STCREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1,50) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) END ,0) AS  DECIMAL(18,2)) AS float)
	
	else (sELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=BAGTBL.STCREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (13) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC)end 
	AS BIRIM_FIYATLAR

	,(SELECT DEFINITION_ FROM LG_123_CLCARD WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE LOGICALREF IN (SELECT TOP 1 CLIENTREF FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE TRCODE=1 AND STOCKREF IN (ALT_MLZ.LOGICALREF) AND DATE_ IN (SELECT MAX(DATE_) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WHERE TRCODE=1 AND STOCKREF IN (ALT_MLZ.LOGICALREF)))) 'SON SATINALMA CARİ ÜNVANI'





-------
--,CASE WHEN (SELECT TOP 1 FIYAT FROM AA_FIYATLANDIRMA_RAPORU WHERE MLZ_ID=BAGTBL.STCREF AND FIYAT IS NOT NULL ORDER BY FIYAT DESC) IS NULL THEN
--(SELECT TOP 1 TANIMLI_FIYAT FROM AA_FIYATLANDIRMA_RAPORU WHERE MLZ_ID=BAGTBL.STCREF AND TANIMLI_FIYAT IS NOT NULL ORDER BY TANIMLI_FIYAT DESC) 
--ELSE (SELECT TOP 1 FIYAT FROM AA_FIYATLANDIRMA_RAPORU WHERE MLZ_ID=BAGTBL.STCREF AND FIYAT IS NOT NULL ORDER BY FIYAT DESC)
--END AS BIRIM_FIYATLAR

,ISNULL((SELECT  SUM(MIKTAR) FROM AA_SARF_PROJE_123_BURAK WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOK_KODU=ALT_MLZ.CODE AND PROJE_KODU=PRO.CODE),0)AS PROJELERE_ÇIKIŞLAR
----------------
,CASE WHEN ISNULL((SELECT  SUM(MIKTAR) FROM AA_SARF_PROJE_123_BURAK WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOK_KODU=ALT_MLZ.CODE AND PROJE_KODU=PRO.CODE),0)>0 THEN BAGTBL.AMNT ELSE 0 END AS [PROJELERE_ÇIKIŞLAR_YENI]

-------------------------------------
---,ISNULL((SELECT  SUM(MIKTAR) FROM AA_SARF_PROJE_123 WHERE STOK_KODU=ALT_MLZ.CODE AND PROJE_KODU=PRO.CODE),0)AS PROJELERE_ÇIKIŞLAR_YENI

--,CASE WHEN  

--CASE ANAMLZ.CARDTYPE WHEN 10 THEN 'Hammadde' WHEN 11 THEN 'Yarımamül'WHEN 12 THEN 'Mamül'WHEN 1 THEN 'Ticarimal'ELSE 'DIGER'END='Yarımamül'
--AND (SELECT SUM(PROJELERE_ÇIKIŞLAR) FROM DST_123_ÜRETİM_İHTİYAÇ_RAPORU_ALT WHERE ALT_KOD=ALT_MLZ.CODE)>0

--THEN 1111111


--ELSE ISNULL((SELECT  SUM(MIKTAR) FROM AA_SARF_PROJE_123 WHERE STOK_KODU=ALT_MLZ.CODE AND PROJE_KODU=PRO.CODE),0)END AS PROJELERE_ÇIKIŞLAR_YENI


------------------------------
--,ISNULL(GNT.ONHAND,0) AS ELDE_KALAN

--,ISNULL(CAST(GNT.ONHAND AS float),0) AS ELDE_KALAN1
--,ISNULL(CAST (GNT.ONHAND AS float) AS decimal(15,33)AS float)),0) AS ELDE_KALAN1
,ISNULL(CAST(GNT.ONHAND AS decimal(12,1)),0) AS ELDE_KALAN

,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(ONHAND) FROM LV_123_01_STINVTOT WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE INVENNO=11 AND STOCKREF=ALT_MLZ.LOGICALREF),0) AS 'ÜRETİM DEPO'


,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(BEKLEYEN) FROM AA_SIPARIS_SATINALMA_RAPORU_YENI_123 WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE ALT_MLZ.CODE=STOK_KODU AND IADE_MIKTAR=0 AND KAPALI=0 ),0) AS AÇIK_SATINALMA_SİPARİŞLERİ ---AND IADE_MIKTAR=0

,CASE WHEN (ISNULL((SELECT SUM(AMOUNT) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE STLINE,LG_123_ITEMS ITM_SUB WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STLINE.STOCKREF = ITM_SUB.LOGICALREF AND PRO.CODE=ITM_SUB.CODE AND STLINE.TRCODE=13 AND STLINE.CANCELLED=0 ),0)) > 0 THEN 'EVET' ELSE 'HAYIR' END AS HIZLI_URETIM ---AND IADE_MIKTAR=0


,CASE WHEN dbo.KS_RecipeCostFunc ( ALT_MLZ.CODE ) = 0 THEN
(CASE WHEN dbo.KS_RecipeCostSubFunc ( ALT_MLZ.LOGICALREF, 1) = 0 THEN 
(CAST(CAST(
		ISNULL
		(CASE 
			WHEN (SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ALT_MLZ.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL 
				THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE CARDREF=ALT_MLZ.LOGICALREF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC    )	
	
			ELSE (SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ALT_MLZ.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) 
	
		END ,0) AS  DECIMAL(18,2)) AS float))
ELSE dbo.KS_RecipeCostSubFunc ( ALT_MLZ.LOGICALREF, 1) END)

ELSE dbo.KS_RecipeCostFunc ( ALT_MLZ.CODE ) END BIRIM_FIYAT

FROM lg_123_ITEMS ANAMLZ WITH (NOLOCK)
INNER JOIN LG_123_STCOMPLN BAGTBL WITH (NOLOCK) ON ANAMLZ.LOGICALREF=BAGTBL.MAINCREF
LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_ITEMS ALT_MLZ WITH (NOLOCK) ON ALT_MLZ.LOGICALREF=BAGTBL.STCREF
LEFT JOIN LG_123_01_DEMANDLINE DEM WITH (NOLOCK) ON DEM.ITEMREF=BAGTBL.MAINCREF
LEFT JOIN LG_123_01_DEMANDFICHE DEMFICHE WITH (NOLOCK) ON DEMFICHE.LOGICALREF=DEM.DEMANDFICHEREF
LEFT JOIN LG_XT1226001_123 XT12 WITH (NOLOCK) ON XT12.PARLOGREF=DEMFICHE.LOGICALREF
LEFT JOIN LG_123_PROJECT PRO WITH (NOLOCK) ON PRO.LOGICALREF=DEMFICHE.PROJECTREF
LEFT JOIN LV_123_01_GNTOTST GNT WITH (NOLOCK) ON GNT.STOCKREF=ALT_MLZ.LOGICALREF AND GNT.INVENNO=2
LEFT JOIN LG_123_UNITSETF UNT WITH (NOLOCK) ON UNT.LOGICALREF=ALT_MLZ.UNITSETREF
 WHERE DEMFICHE.STATUS IS NOT NULL
 AND CASE ANAMLZ.CARDTYPE WHEN 10 THEN 'Hammadde' WHEN 11 THEN 'Yarımamül'WHEN 12 THEN 'Mamül'WHEN 1 THEN 'Ticarimal'ELSE 'DIGER'END='Mamül'
 --AND PRO.CODE='GXLE031'
 --and ALT_MLZ.code='RVSF0099Y001'
-- AND ANAMLZ.CODE='GXLE031'

 ) AS RAPOR 
-- ORDER BY FIS_NO

-------------

UNION ALL


SELECT MLZ_ID ,FIS_NO,FİŞ_TARİHİ,FİŞ_ÖZEL_KODU,PROJE_KODU,URETIM_BITIS_TARIHI,ANAMALZEME_URETIM_TARIHI,MALZEME_ÖZEL_KODU_ANAMALZEME,ANA_ÜRÜN_MİKTAR,KARAVAN_KODU_TÜR,KARAVAN_KODU,KARAVAN_ADI,ALT_KOD_TÜR,MALZEME_ÖZEL_KODU_ALT,ALIM_TARIH,ALIM_TARIH_AY,ALIM_TARIH_HAFTA,ALT_KOD,ALT_ADI,MIKTAR,RAPOR.BIRIM,
PROJELERE_ÇIKIŞLAR,PROJELERE_ÇIKIŞLAR_YENI,ELDE_KALAN,[ÜRETİM DEPO],AÇIK_SATINALMA_SİPARİŞLERİ,

--(ANA_ÜRÜN_MİKTAR*MIKTAR) AS TOPLAM_İHTİYAÇ,
0 AS TOPLAM_İHTİYAÇ,
BIRIM_FIYATLAR BIRIM_FIYAT_OLD, (MIKTAR*BIRIM_FIYATLAR) AS TUTAR_OLD ,[SON SATINALMA CARİ ÜNVANI] , ANASTOKGRUPKODU,ALTSTOKGRUPKODU,HIZLI_URETIM, (MIKTAR*BIRIM_FIYAT) AS TUTAR , BIRIM_FIYAT

FROM (
SELECT ANAMLZ.LOGICALREF AS MLZ_ID,
DEMFICHE.FICHENO FIS_NO,
PRO.CODE PROJE_KODU,
convert(varchar, DEMFICHE.DATE_, 104)FİŞ_TARİHİ,
--DEMFICHE.DATE_ FİŞ_TARİHİ,
convert(varchar, XT12.URETIM_BITIS_TARIHI, 104)URETIM_BITIS_TARIHI,
----------------------------
convert(varchar, DATEADD(day,ANAMLZ.SPECODE4*-1,XT12.URETIM_BITIS_TARIHI), 104)AS ANAMALZEME_URETIM_TARIHI,
convert(varchar, DATEADD(day,ALT_MLZ.SPECODE4*-1,XT12.URETIM_BITIS_TARIHI), 104)AS ALIM_TARIH_ESKI,
convert(varchar, DATEADD(day,(convert(int,ALT_MLZ.SPECODE4)+convert(int,ANAMLZ.SPECODE4))*-1,XT12.URETIM_BITIS_TARIHI), 104)AS ALIM_TARIH,
--convert(int,ALT_MLZ.SPECODE4)+convert(int,ANAMLZ.SPECODE4) AS XX,


DATEPART(WK,(convert(datetime, DATEADD(day,(convert(int,ALT_MLZ.SPECODE4)+convert(int,ANAMLZ.SPECODE4))*-1,XT12.URETIM_BITIS_TARIHI), 104)))AS ALIM_TARIH_HAFTA,


----------------------------------
ANAMLZ.STGRPCODE ANASTOKGRUPKODU,
ALT_MLZ.STGRPCODE ALTSTOKGRUPKODU,
--XT12.URETIM_BITIS_TARIHI  URETIM_BITIS_TARIHI,
ALT_MLZ.SPECODE4 MALZEME_ÖZEL_KODU_ALT,
DEMFICHE.SPECODE FİŞ_ÖZEL_KODU,
--convert(varchar, DATEADD(day,ALT_MLZ.SPECODE4*-1,XT12.URETIM_BITIS_TARIHI), 104)AS ALIM_TARIH,

-- DATEADD(day,ALT_MLZ.SPECODE4*-1,XT12.URETIM_BITIS_TARIHI) AS ALIM_TARIH,
 MONTH(DATEADD(day,(convert(int,ALT_MLZ.SPECODE4)+convert(int,ANAMLZ.SPECODE4))*-1,XT12.URETIM_BITIS_TARIHI)) ALIM_TARIH_AY,

DEM.AMOUNT AS [ANA_ÜRÜN_MİKTAR],
ANAMLZ.SPECODE4 MALZEME_ÖZEL_KODU_ANAMALZEME,
CASE ANAMLZ.CARDTYPE WHEN 10 THEN 'Hammadde' WHEN 11 THEN 'Yarımamül'WHEN 12 THEN 'Mamül'WHEN 1 THEN 'Ticarimal'ELSE 'DIGER'END AS KARAVAN_KODU_TÜR,
ANAMLZ.CODE AS KARAVAN_KODU,
ANAMLZ.NAME AS KARAVAN_ADI,
ALT_MLZ.CODE AS ALT_KOD,
CASE ALT_MLZ.CARDTYPE WHEN 10 THEN 'Hammadde' WHEN 11 THEN 'Yarımamül'WHEN 12 THEN 'Mamül'WHEN 1 THEN 'Ticarimal'ELSE 'DIGER'END AS ALT_KOD_TÜR,
ALT_MLZ.NAME AS ALT_ADI
--,BAGTBL.AMNT AS MIKTAR
------
,BAGTBL.AMNT *(SELECT MIKTAR FROM DST_123_ÜRETİM_İHTİYAÇ_RAPORU_ALT WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE ALT_KOD=ANAMLZ.CODE and PROJE_KODU=PRO.CODE)AS MIKTAR---

-------------
,UNT.CODE [BIRIM]
--,(SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WHERE LINETYPE=0 AND PRICE<>0 AND STOCKREF=BAGTBL.STCREF AND TRCODE IN (1,50) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC ) BIRIM_FIYATLAR---27012023 TARIHLI
------
,CAST(CAST(
	ISNULL
	(CASE WHEN 
	
	(sELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=BAGTBL.STCREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1,50) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK)  WHERE CARDREF=BAGTBL.STCREF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC    )	
	
	ELSE (sELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK)  WHERE STOCKREF=BAGTBL.STCREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1,50) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) END ,0) AS  DECIMAL(18,2)) AS float) AS BIRIM_FIYATLAR

	,(SELECT DEFINITION_ FROM LG_123_CLCARD WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE LOGICALREF IN (SELECT TOP 1 CLIENTREF FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE TRCODE=1 AND STOCKREF IN (ALT_MLZ.LOGICALREF) AND  DATE_ IN (SELECT MAX(DATE_) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WHERE TRCODE=1 AND  STOCKREF IN (ALT_MLZ.LOGICALREF)))) 'SON SATINALMA CARİ ÜNVANI'
-------



--,CASE WHEN (SELECT TOP 1 FIYAT FROM AA_FIYATLANDIRMA_RAPORU WHERE MLZ_ID=BAGTBL.STCREF AND FIYAT IS NOT NULL ORDER BY FIYAT DESC) IS NULL THEN
--(SELECT TOP 1 TANIMLI_FIYAT FROM AA_FIYATLANDIRMA_RAPORU WHERE MLZ_ID=BAGTBL.STCREF AND TANIMLI_FIYAT IS NOT NULL ORDER BY TANIMLI_FIYAT DESC) 
--ELSE (SELECT TOP 1 FIYAT FROM AA_FIYATLANDIRMA_RAPORU WHERE MLZ_ID=BAGTBL.STCREF AND FIYAT IS NOT NULL ORDER BY FIYAT DESC)
--END AS BIRIM_FIYATLAR

---,ISNULL((SELECT  SUM(MIKTAR) FROM AA_SARF_PROJE_123 WHERE STOK_KODU=ALT_MLZ.CODE AND PROJE_KODU=PRO.CODE),0)AS PROJELERE_ÇIKIŞLAR


,CASE WHEN  


(SELECT SUM(PROJELERE_ÇIKIŞLAR) FROM DST_123_ÜRETİM_İHTİYAÇ_RAPORU_ALT WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE ALT_KOD=ANAMLZ.CODE )>0

THEN BAGTBL.AMNT *(SELECT PROJELERE_ÇIKIŞLAR FROM DST_123_ÜRETİM_İHTİYAÇ_RAPORU_ALT WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE ALT_KOD=ANAMLZ.CODE and PROJE_KODU=PRO.CODE )


ELSE 0 END  AS PROJELERE_ÇIKIŞLAR

-------------------------190323------
,CASE WHEN 
CASE WHEN  


(SELECT SUM(PROJELERE_ÇIKIŞLAR) FROM DST_123_ÜRETİM_İHTİYAÇ_RAPORU_ALT WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE ALT_KOD=ANAMLZ.CODE )>0

THEN BAGTBL.AMNT *(SELECT PROJELERE_ÇIKIŞLAR FROM DST_123_ÜRETİM_İHTİYAÇ_RAPORU_ALT WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE ALT_KOD=ANAMLZ.CODE and PROJE_KODU=PRO.CODE )


ELSE 0 END >0 THEN BAGTBL.AMNT *(SELECT MIKTAR FROM DST_123_ÜRETİM_İHTİYAÇ_RAPORU_ALT WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE ALT_KOD=ANAMLZ.CODE and PROJE_KODU=PRO.CODE)ELSE 0 END AS [PROJELERE_ÇIKIŞLAR_YENI]





------------------------------
--,ISNULL(GNT.ONHAND,0) AS ELDE_KALAN

---,ISNULL(CAST(GNT.ONHAND AS  int),0) AS ELDE_KALAN1

,ISNULL(CAST(GNT.ONHAND AS decimal(12,1)),0) AS ELDE_KALAN
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(ONHAND) FROM LV_123_01_STINVTOT WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE INVENNO=11 AND STOCKREF=ALT_MLZ.LOGICALREF),0) AS 'ÜRETİM DEPO'



,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(BEKLEYEN)FROM AA_SIPARIS_SATINALMA_RAPORU_YENI_123 WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE ALT_MLZ.CODE=STOK_KODU AND IADE_MIKTAR=0 AND KAPALI=0 ),0) AS AÇIK_SATINALMA_SİPARİŞLERİ ---AND IADE_MIKTAR=0

,CASE WHEN (ISNULL((SELECT SUM(AMOUNT) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE STLINE,LG_123_ITEMS ITM_SUB WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STLINE.STOCKREF = ITM_SUB.LOGICALREF AND PRO.CODE=ITM_SUB.CODE AND STLINE.TRCODE=13 AND STLINE.CANCELLED=0 ),0)) > 0 THEN 'EVET' ELSE 'HAYIR' END AS HIZLI_URETIM ---AND IADE_MIKTAR=0


,CASE WHEN dbo.KS_RecipeCostFunc ( ALT_MLZ.CODE ) = 0 THEN
(CASE WHEN dbo.KS_RecipeCostSubFunc ( ALT_MLZ.LOGICALREF, 1) = 0 THEN 
(CAST(CAST(
		ISNULL
		(CASE 
			WHEN (SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ALT_MLZ.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL 
				THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE CARDREF=ALT_MLZ.LOGICALREF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC    )	
	
			ELSE (SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ALT_MLZ.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) 
	
		END ,0) AS  DECIMAL(18,2)) AS float))
ELSE dbo.KS_RecipeCostSubFunc ( ALT_MLZ.LOGICALREF, 1) END)

ELSE dbo.KS_RecipeCostFunc ( ALT_MLZ.CODE ) END BIRIM_FIYAT


FROM lg_123_ITEMS ANAMLZ WITH (NOLOCK)
INNER JOIN LG_123_STCOMPLN BAGTBL  WITH (NOLOCK) ON ANAMLZ.LOGICALREF=BAGTBL.MAINCREF
LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_ITEMS ALT_MLZ WITH (NOLOCK) ON ALT_MLZ.LOGICALREF=BAGTBL.STCREF
LEFT JOIN LG_123_01_DEMANDLINE DEM WITH (NOLOCK) ON DEM.ITEMREF=BAGTBL.MAINCREF
LEFT JOIN LG_123_01_DEMANDFICHE DEMFICHE WITH (NOLOCK) ON DEMFICHE.LOGICALREF=DEM.DEMANDFICHEREF
LEFT JOIN LG_XT1226001_123 XT12 WITH (NOLOCK) ON XT12.PARLOGREF=DEMFICHE.LOGICALREF
LEFT JOIN LG_123_PROJECT PRO WITH (NOLOCK) ON PRO.LOGICALREF=DEMFICHE.PROJECTREF
LEFT JOIN LV_123_01_GNTOTST GNT WITH (NOLOCK) ON GNT.STOCKREF=ALT_MLZ.LOGICALREF AND GNT.INVENNO=2
LEFT JOIN LG_123_UNITSETF UNT WITH (NOLOCK) ON UNT.LOGICALREF=ALT_MLZ.UNITSETREF
 WHERE ANAMLZ.SPECODE5='ANAMLZ' AND DEMFICHE.STATUS IS NOT NULL
  AND CASE ANAMLZ.CARDTYPE WHEN 10 THEN 'Hammadde' WHEN 11 THEN 'Yarımamül'WHEN 12 THEN 'Mamül'WHEN 1 THEN 'Ticarimal'ELSE 'DIGER'END='Yarımamül'
  --AND PRO.CODE='GXLE031'

 --and ALT_MLZ.code='RVSF0099Y001'
 --AND ANAMLZ.CODE='GXLE031'


 ) AS RAPOR 
-- ORDER BY FIS_NO
sample_data: ATLANDI: Exception calling "Fill" with "1" argument(s): "Yürütme Zaman Aşımı Süresi Doldu. Zaman aşımı süresi işlem tamamlanmadan önce doldu veya sunucu yanıt vermiyor."
